friendly_name: Mission Registry and API Boundary Doctrine
purpose_context: Every dashboard request, CLI invocation, and (future) MCP tool today reads kitty-specs/ from disk via independent code paths, with no caching, no shared service contract, and no architectural test forbidding it. This mission introduces a MissionRegistry + WorkPackageRegistry that mtime-cache filesystem reads and serve every transport-side consumer, codifies three new doctrine artefacts (DIRECTIVE_API_DEPENDENCY_DIRECTION, DIRECTIVE_REST_RESOURCE_ORIENTATION, HATEOAS-LITE paradigm), and lands three architectural tests that enforce the single-entry-point invariant in CI. Mission A of the rescoped epic #645 (Stable Application API Surface for UI/CLI/MCP/SDK).
purpose_tldr: Make the MissionRegistry the single sanctioned reader of mission/WP data for every transport, enforced by new doctrine and CI tests.
